name: Italian Roast Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all excess fat from the roast.
2. Mince 1 onion, the garlic, celery, and salt pork.
3. Lightly flour the roast; rub with the minced mixture.
4. Slice the remaining onions and place them in a Crock Pot.
5. Place the roast on top of the onions.
6. Cover and cook on low setting for 10 to 12 hours.
